transcript:
[Meeting date: 2026-07-20]
[00:00] You: Infrastructure migration planning. We're moving from AWS us-east-1 to multi-region by September 30th.
[00:50] Speaker 1: First step is the CDN migration. I'll complete the CloudFront to Cloudflare migration for static assets by August 8th.
[01:30] Speaker 2: Database replication needs to be set up before we can go multi-region. I'll configure Postgres read replicas in us-west-2 by August 15th.
[02:10] Speaker 3: Load balancing config needs updating too. I'll update the ALB routing rules to support the new regional endpoints by August 12th.
[02:50] You: What about the disaster recovery runbook?
[03:05] Speaker 4: I'll write the updated DR runbook for the multi-region setup. I'll have a draft by August 20th. I'll need input from Speaker 2 on the RTO/RPO targets first.
[03:40] Speaker 2: I'll send Speaker 4 the RTO/RPO requirements by July 24th.
[04:05] Speaker 1: I should also mention — if we get sign-off from security on the Cloudflare WAF rules, I'll migrate those too. That's contingent on security review.
[04:40] You: Understood — flag that as conditional. Speaker 3, can you do a capacity planning review for the new regions?
[04:55] Speaker 3: I'll do a capacity planning analysis and size the new instances by July 28th.
[05:20] Speaker 4: We also need to update the monitoring dashboards to show per-region metrics. I'll update Datadog dashboards by August 18th.
[05:50] Speaker 1: And I'll update the deployment pipeline to support blue-green deploys across regions. I'll have that done by August 22nd.
[06:15] You: Good. Cutover to multi-region production is September 30th. Let's schedule a dry-run for September 20th.

action_items.source_quote: I'll complete the CloudFront to Cloudflare migration for static assets by August 8th.

action_items.source_quote: I'll update the ALB routing rules to support the new regional endpoints by August 12th.
I'll send Speaker 4 the RTO/RPO requirements by July 24th.

action_items.source_quote: I'll write the updated DR runbook for the multi-region setup. I'll have a draft by August 20th.

action_items.description: Perform capacity planning analysis and size new regional instances
action_items.source_quote: I'll do a capacity planning analysis and size the new instances by July 28th.

action_items.description: Update Datadog dashboards to show per-region metrics
action_items.source_quote: I'll update Datadog dashboards by August 18th.

action_items.description: Update deployment pipeline to support blue-green deploys across regions
action_items.source_quote: I'll update the deployment pipeline to support blue-green deploys across regions. I'll have that done by August 22nd.

decisions: Cloudflare WAF migration is conditional on security sign-off
